message:
style: rustfmt formatting adjustments in macaroon, diagnostics, and process

Apply rustfmt-driven formatting corrections:
- macaroon.rs: reformat match arm destructuring for ThirdParty variant
- diagnostics.rs: reformat multi-line assert! expressions and reorder
  use imports alphabetically
- process.rs: collapse multi-line io::Error::new calls in ChildStdin,
  ChildStdout, and ChildStderr cancel guards to single-line form

No behavioral changes; purely formatting consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
